Container.Name: romm-link
Container.Overview: Unraid-first companion launcher for RomM. Discovers RomM and emulator containers on the Docker network, then exposes a browser health/discovery dashboard.
Container.Requires: Existing Docker network named romm and access to /var/run/docker.sock.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: romm-link dashboard/API port

Config.Name: Docker Socket
Config.Description: Allows romm-link to discover RomM/emulator containers and their status

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Persistent romm-link settings saved from the web UI

Config.Name: RomM URL
Config.Description: RomM API base URL. Use Docker DNS on the romm network; do not use fixed IP addresses.

Config.Name: RomM API Key
Config.Description: Optional RomM bearer token/API key for authenticated API calls. If blank, romm-link can use RomM username/password below.

Config.Name: RomM Username
Config.Description: Optional RomM username for OAuth password login when no API key is provided

Config.Name: RomM Password
Config.Description: Optional RomM password for OAuth password login when no API key is provided

Config.Name: Docker Network
Config.Description: Existing Docker network shared by RomM and emulator containers

Config.Name: PCSX2 Container
Config.Description: PCSX2 container name

Config.Name: RPCS3 Container
Config.Description: RPCS3 container name

Config.Name: Dolphin Container
Config.Description: Dolphin container name

Config.Name: PCSX2 Web URL
Config.Description: Docker-internal endpoint for PCSX2 via Docker DNS

Config.Name: RPCS3 Web URL
Config.Description: Docker-internal endpoint for RPCS3 via Docker DNS

Config.Name: Dolphin Web URL
Config.Description: Docker-internal endpoint for Dolphin via Docker DNS

Config.Name: PCSX2 Browser URL
Config.Description: Optional browser-facing trusted URL for PCSX2, e.g. https://pcsx2.example.com. Leave blank to derive from Docker host port.

Config.Name: RPCS3 Browser URL
Config.Description: Optional browser-facing trusted URL for RPCS3, e.g. https://rpcs3.example.com. Leave blank to derive from Docker host port.

Config.Name: Dolphin Browser URL
Config.Description: Optional browser-facing trusted URL for Dolphin/Selkies, e.g. https://dolphin.example.com. Leave blank to derive from Docker host port.

Config.Name: Emulator Browser Scheme
Config.Description: URL scheme used for generated browser-facing emulator links when no explicit browser URL is set.

Config.Name: RomM Path Prefix
Config.Description: Path prefix reported by RomM before platform folders, e.g. roms for RomM paths like roms/wii/Game.rvz

Config.Name: Emulator ROM Path Prefix
Config.Description: Path inside emulator containers where the RomM library is mounted. romm-link rewrites RomM paths under ROMM_PATH_PREFIX to this mount before launching.

Config.Name: Emulator Display
Config.Description: DISPLAY value used when executing emulator launch commands inside browser emulator containers
